title: kaslif modpack
description: its all the mods i use daily, it contains performance and QOL mods
body:
**(FABRIC ONLY)**

these are some of the main mods that i use for my day to day use

i want to note that these mods dont really CHANGE the game but are all client side

for the rescorce packs you dont have to use the ones you dont like

a LOT of these mods are from fabulosly optimised so big thanks to them.

and thank YOU for (hopefully) downloading it
